entry.title: Re: Equivalent fiori app for F-05 in Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi Henrike, 

Thank you so much for your answer. But what i'm looking for is an app for the customer be able to post their exchange rate invoices manually. 

We could do this in F-05 before, by keeping the foreign currency amount zero and entering company code currency amount manually.

We also have already completed customizing steps for Foreign Currency Valuation, no questions regarding that part.

Thanks,

Best.

entry.title: Account Assignment Reference - OTC Transactions/Securities/Exposure Subitems
entry.content:
How to configure substitution rule for account assignment reference (OTC Transaction/Securities/Exposure Subitems) in SAP S/4HANA Cloud.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Account Assignment Reference - OTC Transactions/Secur...
entry.content:
Refer the help portal document to know about the Apps

  1. Account Assignment References - OTC Transactions (Substitution Rules)
  2. Account Assignment References - Securities (Substitution Rules)
  3. Account Assignment References - Exposure Subitems (Substitution Rules)

 

Regards,

SAP Support

Hi @Vitaliy-R,

Week 4 challenge is too challenging too resolve.. I will be grateful if someone can provide me a hint...

Initially got the below error

Then to fix this error, declared variable 

table_structure_ports but still getting error, is this approach correct?
Regards,
Sushmita

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "Multi-model with SAP HANA Cloud" developer challenge
entry.content:
It was giving some error in console after the steps you suggested which I tried out earlier.

Actually, I deleted the BAS instance and created a new one. I cannot see this error again.

Thank you.

entry.title: HANA Deadlock issue
entry.content:
Environment

SAP Business One (9.3 PL 3) on HANA database.

HANA version: 1.00.122.05.1481577062

Issue background

We were using SAP B one on HANA database since from 2018. 

Deadlock in full SAP operation, happened on 07th, 11th, 12th, 13th and 14th and system got hanged for couple of hours. As a solution, we had to restart the HANA DB server to bring the operation back. 

We extract part of the information from the indexserver trace file information, given below. 

In this information we observed: 

1. Deadlock related information.

2. MVCC long running uncommitted write transaction 

3. Transaction blocks the garbage collection

Please help us to find the root cause for above and how to rectify.

Deadlock related information in trace log 

[18371]{302509}[843/73267264] 2024-06-11 13:16:32.827081 e Lock WaitGraph.cc(00461) : Deadlock detected: Deadlock detected while executing transaction (TRANSACTION_ID=843, UPDATE_TRANSACTION_ID=73267264):
This is not an HDB error. User or application may cause a deadlock due to incorrect access sequences on shared objects.

current tx UPDATE_TRANSACTION_ID=73267264, CONNECTION_ID=302509, LOGICAL_CONNECTION_ID=302509, CLIENT_HOST=GIT-LAP-05, CLIENT_IP=192.168.200.154, CLIENT_PID=12156, USER_NAME=SYSTEM, TRANSACTION_TYPE=USER TRANSACTION, VOLUME_ID=3, SQL_STATEMENT=CALL "MOL_LIVE"."SBO_SP_TRANSACTIONNOTIFICATION"(?,?,?,?,?), LOCK_TYPE=RECORD_LOCK, ACQ_LOCK_MODE=EXCLUSIVE, REQ_LOCK_MODE=EXCLUSIVE, OBJECT_ID=1921381, OBJECT_NAME=CTR1, RECORD_ID=[OID=0x0000253C, PARTID=0x0, OFFSET=0x82DD90D3]
blocked by UPDATE_TRANSACTION_ID=73267410, CONNECTION_ID=302111, LOGICAL_CONNECTION_ID=302111, CLIENT_HOST=GIT-LAP-06, CLIENT_IP=192.168.200.240, CLIENT_PID=12408, USER_NAME=SYSTEM, TRANSACTION_TYPE=USER TRANSACTION, VOLUME_ID=3, SQL_STATEMENT=CALL "MOL_LIVE"."SBO_SP_TRANSACTIONNOTIFICATION"(?,?,?,?,?), LOCK_TYPE=RECORD_LOCK, ACQ_LOCK_MODE=EXCLUSIVE, REQ_LOCK_MODE=EXCLUSIVE, OBJECT_ID=1921381, OBJECT_NAME=CTR1, RECORD_ID=[OID=0x0000253C, PARTID=0x0, OFFSET=0x784E5E26]
blocked by current transaction (TRANSACTION_ID=843, see above for the details)

MVCC long running uncommitted write transaction
 Line 20903: [9835]{-1}[-1/-1] 2024-06-10 15:28:22.750216 e Statement        mvcc_anti_ager.cc(01126) : long running uncommitted write transaction detected:

Transaction blocks the garbage collection

Line 25598: [10547]{-1}[12/73303937] 2024-06-11 13:32:32.903160 i HistoryManager HistoryManager.cpp(00523) : Maximum garbage collection parallelity set to 48
Line 26516: The transaction blocks the garbage collection of HANA database.:

entry.title: Re: Upload document/file to BTP DMS repository failed wit...
entry.content:
@rupeshpandit1999 

Another approach is to use cap-js/sdm plugin.

https://www.npmjs.com/package/@cap-js/sdm

entry.title: Re: Availability of "Restricted Dimension" in HANA
entry.content: Sorry! What I meant was "Calculated dimension". Will "Calculated dimension" be available in HANA?

entry.title: Purchase order and downpayments
entry.content:
Is there a way to reduce the purchase order amount by the value resulting from the down payment invoice?

It is a business requirement to align what the supplier sends with our records.

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Re: Receiving error while adding new ABAP Cloud Project i...
entry.content: Hello Praveen. Your welcome. This is rather outside of my area of expertise so I'm not sure if the following is helpful, but if you don't see the tile directly on the start screen then try the following: Click on the button 'Home' on the top left and then in the resulting dropdown area look for 'Identity and Access Management - User Management'. As an alternative option you can try to use the search bar on the top and search for something like 'maintain'.

entry.title: Error FM account assignment Fund/Fund Centre/Commitment Item cannot be budgeted in 9F/2024
entry.content:
Hi Experts

I have configured Fund Management for my client. I have Ledger 9F and 9G ledgers in the system

I have created budget structure in the system.

When I try to create budget document in the system I get error

FM account assignment Fund/Fund Centre/Commitment Item cannot be budgeted in 9F/2024 

I need help on this urgently as client wants to budget creation in the system

Thanks 

Rajeev Uppal

BR

Siba

entry.title: Re: Table fields alignment using Row Component in SAP Build
entry.content:
Hello Jakub,

Thank you for your inputs. It's really help me. I didn't find the button to accept as solution.

entry.title: Bring Open-Source LLMs into SAP AI Core with Infinity
entry.content:
Authors: @YatseaLi, @cesarecalabria, @amagnani, @jacobahtan

In the previous blog post about Bring Open-Source or or Open-Weight LLMs into SAP AI Core, we have gone through an overview introduction of deploying and running open-source LLMs in SAP AI Core with BYOM approach, the use cases of open-source LLMs, and the sample application byom-oss-llm-ai-core and its solution architecture, and various options of leveraging open-source LLM Inference Servers to serve the open-source LLMs within SAP AI Core, such as Ollama, LocalAI, llama.cpp and vLLM. (In the rest of this article, I will use Open-Source LLMs representing both Open-Source and Open-Weight LLMs for simplification)

Here you have the blog post series.

Blog post series of Bring Open-Source LLMs into SAP AI Core
Part 1 – Bring Open-Source LLms into SAP AI Core: Overview
Part 2 – Bring Open-Source LLMs into SAP AI Core with Ollama
Part 3 – Bring Open-Source LLMs into SAP AI Core with Custom Transformer Server
Part 4 – Bring Open-Source LLMs into SAP AI Core with Infinity (this blog post)
Part 5 – Bring Open-Source LLMs into SAP AI Core with LocalAI (To be published)
Part 6 – Bring Open-Source LLMs into SAP AI Core with llama.cpp (To be published)
Part 7 – Bring Open-Source LLMs into SAP AI Core with vLLM (to Te published)

Note: You can try it out the sample AI Core sample app byom-oss-llm-ai-core by following its manual here with all the technical details. The followup blog posts will just wrap up the technical details of each option.

In this blog post, we'll have an end-to-end technical deep dive into the first option of bringing open-source LLMs within SAP AI Core through Infinity.

  • A quick glance at Infinity
  • Deploy and Run Infinity in SAP AI Core
  • Inference a text embedding model from Massive Text Embedding Benchmark (MTEB) with OpenAI-compatible embedding API, in our case, we used nreimers/MiniLM-L6-H384-uncased.
    • Direct API call
    • SAP Generative AI Hub SDK & Langchain

A quick glance at Infinity

 

 

Infinity is a high-performance REST API for serving vector embeddings generated by various text-embedding models. It's open-source under the MIT license, making it freely available for integration into SAP AI Core.

Key features of Infinity include:

  • Model Agnostic: Supports a wide range of models from the SentenceTransformers library.
  • Fast Inference: Leverages backends like PyTorch, ONNX, TensorRT, and CTranslate2 for optimized performance across different hardware (CPU, GPU).
  • Dynamic Batching: Maximizes throughput by processing requests efficiently while the GPU is busy.
  • Accurate Embeddings: Delivers embeddings consistent with SentenceTransformers (up to numerical precision).
  • Easy to Use: Employs FastAPI for a user-friendly API with Swagger documentation.
  • OpenAI Compatibility: API aligns with OpenAI's Embedding specifications, simplifying integration with other tools.

Here you have a short demo about Infinity.

With Infinity, running it locally on your own computer is very straight-forward with three steps: Install > Start > Inference

Infinity is freely available for download from its website. 

 

 

pip install infinity-emb[all]

 

 

After your pip install, with your venv active, you can run the CLI directly:

 

 

infinity_emb --url-prefix "/v1" --model-name-or-path "nreimers/MiniLM-L6-H384-uncased" --port "7998"

 

 

If you would like to understand what are the various options/parameters:

 

 

infinity_emb --help

 

 

For our case, we used one of the models from Massive Text Embedding Benchmark (MTEB), nreimers/MiniLM-L6-H384-uncased.

Once it's is up and running, now we can inference the text embedding model. First, we can first check if the model is defined correctly.

 

 

curl -X 'GET' \
 'http://0.0.0.0:7998/v1/models' -H 'accept: application/json' \

Response:
{
   "data":[
      {
         "id":"nreimers/MiniLM-L6-H384-uncased",
         "stats":{
            "queue_fraction":0.0,
            "queue_absolute":0,
            "results_pending":0,
            "batch_size":32
         },
         "object":"model",
         "owned_by":"infinity",
         "created":1719902031,
         "backend":"torch"
      }
   ],
   "object":"list"
}

 

 

 

Next, let's inference against the text embedding model, to generate the following vector embeddings for the following sample text: "a sentence to encode"

 

 

curl -X 'POST' \
  'http://0.0.0.0:7998/v1/embeddings' \
  -H 'accept: application/json' \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{
  "input": [
    "a sentence to encode."
  ]
}'

Response:
{
   "object":"embedding",
   "data":[
      {
         "object":"embedding",
         "embedding":[
            -0.07419787347316742,
            0.05378536880016327,
            "...",
            "...",
            0.008502810262143612,
            0.010130912065505981
         ],
         "index":0
      }
   ],
   "model":"nreimers/MiniLM-L6-H384-uncased",
   "usage":{
      "prompt_tokens":21,
      "total_tokens":21
   },
   "id":"infinity-c522de74-90d2-415d-9455-d3ea480785a0",
   "created":1719903053
}

 

 

That looks promising. You may wonder if you can deploy and run Infinity within SAP AI Core for serving open-source LLMs. The answer is YES.

Deploy and Run Infinity within SAP AI Core

In this section, we will go through the technical details of bringing Infinity into SAP AI Core through BYOM (Bring Your Own Model) approach. All the sample code showed in this section could be found here.

To bring a custom inference server in SAP AI Core, there are some common requirements in SAP AI Core.

  • A docker image to run the custom inference server. The endpoints of its inference API in run-time must start with a versioning prefix, for example, /v1/xxx, /v2/yyy etc.
  • A serving template of SAP AI Core with the metadata of the custom inference server 
  • A github repository for hosting the serving templates to be onboard into SAP AI Core
  • An application in SAP AI Core associated with the github repository above, whose serving templates are created as scenarios artifact in the application.
  • ...

 We won't go through all the steps in this blog post. For the prerequisites and initial configuration(on-boarding github repository and create an application in SAP AI Core), please refer to the prerequisites section of the sample app byom-oss-llm-ai-core.

Instead, we'll take Infinity as a sample custom inference server to deploy and run in SAP AI Core, which is already a ready-to-use inference server to serve open-source LLMs, no extra server inference code is needed. Have that said, apart from bring your own inference code, we can also bring a ready-to-use inference server to SAP AI Core, as long as it is compliant with requirements mentioned above.

Here is the conceptual components diagram of Deploying and Running Infinity within SAP AI Core.


In design time, it only needs two files:

  • A dockerfile to wrap infinity into a docker image for SAP AI Core.
  • A serving template yaml file (infinity-template.yaml) to describe what docker image to be run on what kind of infrastructure spec in SAP AI Core with configurable input parameters etc.

In runtime, we’ll deploy and run an Infinity server in SAP AI Core based on its serving template.

Important Note: The steps described below mainly aims to explain the process, are automated in the jupyter notebooks 00-init-config.ipynb and /infinity-emb/01-deployment.ipynb, which you can run it through, and please pay attention to its prerequisites. Alternatively, you can perform step 4 and 5 through SAP AI Core by manual. 

Step 1: Prepare a Dockerfile to wrap Infinity into a docker image for SAP AI Core

I have prepared a dockerfile of Infinity adapted for SAP AI Core, let's walk it through.

Dockerfile:

 

 

FROM pytorch/pytorch:2.3.0-cuda12.1-cudnn8-runtime AS runtime

WORKDIR /usr/src

# Update and install dependencies
RUN apt-get update && \
    apt-get install -y \
    ca-certificates \
    nginx \
    curl && \
    apt-get clean && \
    rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN python3 -m pip install --upgrade pip==23.2.1 && \
    python3 -m pip install "infinity-emb[all]" && \
    rm -rf /root/.cache/pip

EXPOSE 7997

# Adaptation for SAP AI Core
COPY run.sh /usr/src/run.sh

RUN mkdir -p /nonexistent/ && \
    mkdir -p /hf-home/ && \ 
    chown -R nobody:nogroup /nonexistent /hf-home/ && \
    chmod -R 770 /nonexistent/ /hf-home/ && \
    chmod +x /usr/src/run.sh

ENV HF_HOME=/hf-home
    # Note: Uncomment this ENV with MODEL_NAME & URL_PREFIX if you're running Docker locally. Don't forget about the backslash \
    # MODEL_NAME="nreimers/MiniLM-L6-H384-uncased"
    # URL_PREFIX="/v1"

ENTRYPOINT [ "/usr/src/run.sh" ]

 

 

run.sh:

 

 

#!/bin/bash

# Set default Host to 0.0.0.0 if not already set
HOST="${HOST:-0.0.0.0}"
OPT+=" --host ${HOST}"

# Add port to options if PORT is set and --port is not already in ARG
if [ ! -z "${PORT}" ] && [[ ! "${ARG}" =~ --port ]]; then
	OPT+=" --port ${PORT}"
fi

# Echo the SERVE_FILES_PATH and the options to be used
echo ${MODEL_NAME}
echo ${URL_PREFIX}

# Use set -x to print commands and their arguments as they are executed.
set -x

# Run the service with the model and the prepared options
infinity_emb --url-prefix "${URL_PREFIX}" --model-name-or-path "${MODEL_NAME}"

 

 

The code is somehow self-explained. Here just highlight some important adaptations of Infinity for SAP AI Core.

  1. Adapt the Infinity's API endpoints with /v1 prefix
    As mentioned in the requirements of SAP AI Core, the endpoints of the custom inference server must start with a versioning prefix(/v1/xxx, /v2/yyy etc.).
    Thankfully, Infinity provides such option to configure an URL prefix to the endpoint, --url-prefix "URL_PREFIX", of which this value would be defined through setting up a configuration in SAP AI Core.

  2. Ensure the Embedding Dimension matched to your Vector Database (e.g. SAP HANA Vector Database Engine) Vector column type value
    When storing text embeddings in a vector database, the embedding dimension (number of features) is crucial for ensuring data integrity. Make sure the Text Embedding model you're using uses the right embedding dimensions. For our case, the model, nreimers/MiniLM-L6-H384-uncased uses an Embedding Dimensions of 384.

 

Step 2: Build a Docker image for Infinity and Push it to Docker Hub

This step has been automated with /infinity-emb/01-deployment.ipynb for the sample byom-oss-llm-ai-core. Once the dockerfile is in place, next we can build the docker image and push it to docker hub with commands below:

 

 

# 0.Login to docker hub
docker login -u <YOUR_DOCKER_USER> -p <YOUR_DOCKER_ACCESS_TOKEN>

# 1.Build the docker image
docker build --platform=linux/amd64 -t docker.io/<YOUR_DOCKER_USER>/infinity:ai-core .

# 2.Push the docker image to docker hub to be used by deployment in SAP AI Core
docker push docker.io/<YOUR_DOCKER_USER>/infinity:ai-core

 

 

Step 3: Prepare a Serving Template for Infinity and host it in a Github Repository

I have prepared a sample serving template for Infinity (infinity-template.yaml). Let's walk it through.

 

apiVersion: ai.sap.com/v1alpha1
kind: ServingTemplate
metadata:
  name: infinity
  annotations:
    scenarios.ai.sap.com/description: "Run an Infinity embedding inference server on SAP AI Core"
    scenarios.ai.sap.com/name: "infinity"
    executables.ai.sap.com/description: "Run an Infinity embedding inference server on SAP AI Core"
    executables.ai.sap.com/name: "infinity"
  labels:
    scenarios.ai.sap.com/id: "infinity"
    ai.sap.com/version: "0.0.1"
spec:
  inputs:
    parameters:
    - name: image
      type: "string"
      default: "docker.io/<YOUR_DOCKER_USER>/infinity:ai-core"
      description: "Define the location of the Docker image of which you have built for Infinity following the steps."
    - name: modelName
      type: "string"
      default: "nreimers/MiniLM-L6-H384-uncased"
      description: "Define the Sentence Transformer model (MTEB) you would like to use that Infinity supports. More info: https://michaelfeil.eu/infinity/latest/"
    - name: urlPrefix
      type: "string"
      default: "/v1"
      description: "It is required for SAP AI Core to base the root of the inference server to start with /v1."
    - name: portNumber
      type: "string"
      default: "7997"
      description: "When you run a container, if you want to access the application in the container via a port number."
    - name: resourcePlan
      type: "string"
      default: "infer.s"
      description: "Resource plans are used to select resources in workflow and serving templates."
    - name: minReplicas
      type: "string"
      default: "1"
      description: "The lower limit for the number of replicas to which the autoscaler can scale down."
    - name: maxReplicas
      type: "string"
      default: "1"
      description: "The upper limit for the number of replicas to which the autoscaler can scale down."
  template:
    apiVersion: "serving.kserve.io/v1beta1"
    metadata:
      annotations: |
        autoscaling.knative.dev/metric: concurrency
        autoscaling.knative.dev/target: 1
        autoscaling.knative.dev/targetBurstCapacity: -1
        autoscaling.knative.dev/window: "10m"
        autoscaling.knative.dev/scaleToZeroPodRetentionPeriod: "10m"
      labels: |
        ai.sap.com/resourcePlan: "{{inputs.parameters.resourcePlan}}"
    spec: |
      predictor:
        imagePullSecrets:
        - name: <YOUR_DOCKER_SECRET>
        minReplicas: {{inputs.parameters.minReplicas}}
        maxReplicas: {{inputs.parameters.maxReplicas}}
        containers:
        - name: kserve-container
          image: "{{inputs.parameters.image}}"
          ports:
          - containerPort: {{inputs.parameters.portNumber}}
            protocol: TCP
          env:
          - name: MODEL_NAME
            value: "{{inputs.parameters.modelName}}"
          - name: URL_PREFIX
            value: "{{inputs.parameters.urlPrefix}}"

 

There are 7 input parameters, which are pretty self explanatory, of which more information you may refer to the description value of it.

Step 4: Onboard the Github repository to SAP AI Core

As mentioned in Step 3, the serving template need to be hosted in a Github Repository for SAP AI Core. This step has been automated for the sample byom-oss-llm-ai-core in 00-init-config.ipynb. Alternatively, you can onboard a github repository through SAP AI Launchpad by manual. As a result, the associated Github Repository has been onboarded into SAP AI Core.

 

Step 5: Create an application SAP AI Core and sync with the GitHub repository

This step has been automated for the sample byom-oss-llm-ai-core in 00-init-config.ipynb. Alternatively, you can can create your own app and sync with its associated github repo on-boarded on step 4 through SAP AI Launchpad by manual. As a result, an application has been created, a scenario for ollama is created after synchronization.

If we have a look at the infinity scenario, it has 7 input parameters as defined in its serving template (infinity-template.yaml).

Step 6: Create a configuration and start a deployment

This step has been automated with 01-deployment.ipynb for the sample byom-oss-llm-ai-core. Alternatively, you can can create a configuration and start a deployment with SAP AI Launchpad. Here you have the demo recording:

Step 7: Inference the open-source Text Embedding model (nreimers/MiniLM-L6-H384-uncased) served with Infinity in SAP AI Core

In our sample btp-generative-ai-hub-use-cases/01-social-media-citizen-reporting-genai-hub, the use case is about a fictitious city called "Sagenai City" facing challenges in managing and tracking maintenance in public areas. The city wants to improve the way they handle reported issues from the citizens, by analyzing social media posts & making informed decisions and so effectively tracking & managing issues in public spaces. and output in json schema with plain prompting.

  • Category
  • Priority
  • Summary
  • Description
  • Address
  • Sentiment

Previously, in one of the use case, to deduplicate citizen reported issues, we used one of the SAP AI Core's generative AI Text Embedding model from OpenAI - Text Embedding ADA 002, to generate vector embeddings and store it in SAP HANA Vector Engine. More info you may read about it here.

Option 1 - Inference with direct API call

You can inference the model in Infinity with HTTP calls, which is applicable for any programming language that support http calls to a remote http server, such as JavaScript(CAP), Java(CAP), ABAP, Python etc. Here is some code snippet in Python for illustration. Please check out the full sample jupyter notebook with /infinity-emb/02-embedding.ipynb

 

deployment = ai_api_client.deployment.get(deployment_id)
inference_base_url = f"{deployment.deployment_url}"
endpoint = f"{inference_base_url}/v1/embeddings"
json_data = {
  "input": [
    "A sentence to encode."
  ]
}
response = requests.post(endpoint, headers=headers, json=json_data)
x = json.loads(response.content)
print(x['data'][0]['embedding'])

Results:
[-0.0741010531783104, 0.05380121245980263,...,..., -0.050218887627124786, -0.024147523567080498]

 

Option 2 - Inference with SAP Generative AI Hub SDK and LangChain

You can also inference the model in Infinity with SAP Generative AI Hub SDK, which can simplify the access to SAP Generative AI Hub for application development or integration. Please check its home page of python package as above for details. As of 20 Jun 2024,  the SDK is only available as a python package, hence it is only available for python application development. Here is code snippet for illustration, please check out the full jupyter notebook infinity-emb/02-embedding-sap-genai-hub-sdk.ipynb for more detail. The high-level flow as follows:

  1. Load configurations info
  2. Connect to SAP AI Core via SDK
  3. Check the status and logs of the deployment
  4. Inference the model through SAP Generative AI Hub SDK using OpenAI Embeddings
  5. Using Infinity to generate embeddings to store in SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine
  6. Perform Similarity Search using Infinity > bge-small-en embedding model with SAP HANA Cloud Vector Engine
i. Install SAP Generative AI Hub SDK and Langchain

 

pip install generative-ai-hub-sdk[langchain]

 

ii. Register the scenario as a foundation model scenario

 

from gen_ai_hub.proxy.gen_ai_hub_proxy import GenAIHubProxyClient

GenAIHubProxyClient.add_foundation_model_scenario(
    scenario_id="byom-infinity-server",
    config_names="infinity*",
    prediction_url_suffix="/v1/embeddings",
)
proxy_client = GenAIHubProxyClient(ai_core_client = ai_core_client)

 

iii. Inference with SAP Generative API Hub SDK

 

from gen_ai_hub.proxy.native.openai import embeddings

response = embeddings.create(
    input="Every decoding is another encoding.",
    model_name="nreimers/MiniLM-L6-H384-uncased",
    encoding_format='base64'
)
print(response.data[0].embedding)

 

Try it out

Bring Open-Source LLMs into SAP AI Core with Infinity:
Please refer to this manual to try out deploying and running open-source LLMs with Infinity in SAP AI Core. The source code of this sample is released under Apache 2.0 license. You should be accountable for your own choice of commercially viable open-source LLMs/LMMs.

Summary

This blog post has explored the exciting potential of integrating open-source LLMs with SAP AI Core's Bring Your Own Model (BYOM) approach. We've delved into the technical details of deploying and running Infinity, a high-performance text embedding inference server, within your SAP AI Core environment.

We have been witnessing a fundamental transformation in some industries and functions by Generative AI, such as education, media press, software development, marketing, customer service etc. The open-source LLM community is evolving rapidly, and has a role to play in the need of data protection and privacy. 

For SAP developers that need to leverage generative AI in their solutions, SAP provides Generative AI Hub as an easy access to a wild range of leading LLMs including both proprietary and open-source, which should have most of your use-cases covered.

In particular business cases where you need different open-source LLM which are not yet available in Generative AI Hub, or you have fine tune some open-source model with your own data, SAP AI Core can be used to deploy and run them with custom inference server or read-to-use open-source inference servers, such as Infinity a in a manner of your choice and your responsibility.

Disclaimer: SAP notes that posts about potential uses of generative AI and large language models are merely the individual poster's ideas and opinions, and do not represent SAP's official position or future development roadmap. SAP has no legal obligation or other commitment to pursue any course of business, or develop or release any functionality, mentioned in any post or related content on this website.

entry.title: Re: Jokes corner
entry.content:
Currently 3 Aliens tell quite low jokes on video platforms. Here are a few examples:

  • How do You call a retired Terminator? . EX-Terminator
  • My Alphabet only has 25 letters... I don't know (wh)Y.
  • Why can't You hear the Pterodactyl on the toilet? - The P(ee) is silent.

entry.title: Re: RAP Create button still enabled after disabling the f...
entry.content:
Hi there,

May I ask what do you mean by 'global action area'?

The annotation I mentioned (plus 2 others for Update and Delete) are used specifically to hide the standard CUD operations buttons, which are
- the create and delete that you see either at the List Report or if in the Object Page, at the tables
- and the update and delete at the top of the Object Page

Regards,
Jessie

entry.title: Re: Showing Partial Dimension Members in SAC Chart Using...
entry.content:
@RajuRao 

Create a calculated dimension and use that in your chart. no need for any scripting.

You can use SUBSTRING operator to get your display characters.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Does importing APQC farmwork will impact my already p...
entry.content:
Hi Ghemraj,

Importing APQC PCF into Signavio will not impact your existing folder structure or attributes. You can either import it into "My Documents" or create a separate folder in "Shared Documents" to house the APQC content.

Regards,
Projit

Thanks in advance.

M Boopalan

entry.title: Re: Access to Performance Analysis tool in SAC
entry.content:
@MadhuLodugu 

I think the below are required for accessing performance Analysis Tool

  • Users with Read and Update permissions for System Information.
  • Admin and BI Admin standard application roles.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: SAC - Number Format

@mtayibi 

Unfortunately No. Custom formats are not supported yet.

 

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: Showing Partial Dimension Members in SAC Chart Using...
entry.content: Hello Nikhil,

entry.title: Re: SAP ByD: Is it possible to do budget reporting withou...
entry.content:
Thank you David for the explanation. I understand that it is possible to upload budget amounts from Cost and Revenue. However, our budgeted amounts are by groups of G/L accounts rather than at G/L level.

So I was looking to upload at Budget Category level which seems is not possible without Active Budget Control.

entry.title: Outage Communication Subscription on Bundles in SAP for Me
entry.content:
Since the release of the Bundle feature in April 2024, SAP for Me users can group Cloud Services and Systems into meaningful semantics that help to better understand the impact of outages on business and IT processes.

The next step for Bundle creators (currently Super Admins and Cloud Admins) is to be able to subscribe relevant users for outage communication notification email related to a Bundle. Doing so, users are subscribed in one step to all Cloud Service and Systems included in a Bundle.  

How does it work? 

Once you have created a Bundle, move to the Subscribe tab in the Bundle detail page and click Add Subscriptions. 

An input window pops up. 

  1. Choose one or several contacts from the list and click OK. You can also use the search functionality.                       

     

  2. Per default all Event Types (Customer Communication, Disruption/Degradation, Maintenance and Major Upgrade) and Notification Types are checked.  It is up to the users to choose among these options to manage their Outage Notification email.  

Subscription list

The subscribed users will be able to see the corresponding Bundles(s) in the Get Notified tab and change or delete the subscription created for them in the Bundle page.

 

You have just learned how to find and use the latest Bundle features in SAP for Me. Feedback is highly appreciated. Please use the comment section for that.

If you are interested in upcoming features, please follow my profile and the SAP for Me tag.

entry.title: Re: Does importing APQC farmwork will impact my already p...
entry.content: Thanks @Projit , thanks alot

entry.title: Class deleted, object catalog still present?
entry.content:
On ERP with ABAP Version 750, I created accidentally a class where I wanted to create an interface. I then deleted the class and wanted to create the interface with the same name. Now I get the error 


There is already an object directory entry: <...>

Message no. OO644

Any Ideas of how do I could get over this problem?

entry.title: SAP for Utilities Presented by ASUG Best Practices
entry.content:
The 17th annual SAP for Utilities, Presented by ASUG event will take place from Sept. 9–11 in Miami. Engage with peers, connect with SAP leadership, and unlock the full potential of your SAP technology at North America’s leading SAP utilities conference.

Registration link: https://www.asug.com/events/2024-sap-for-utilities-presented-by-asug

entry.title: Re: Showing Partial Dimension Members in SAC Chart Using...
entry.content: Hello Nikhil, I am using BW 7.5 Live connection in which Calculated dimension is not available. We are going to migrate to HANA shortly. I am not sure whether Calculated dimension will work there

entry.title: Espresso Session: SAP Utilities Core – Transform Your Core Business with SAP’s Cloud Solutions
entry.content:
In this session, you will get an overview of the SAP Utilities Core offering. Learn how it can help you to bring your core business processes like meter-to-cash and customer service to the cloud, improve performance, and reduce cost. After attending this session, you will know what differentiates the Utilities Core from a pure SAP S/4HANA Utilities approach and what SAP is providing and planning to support your cloud journey.

Registration: https://events.sap.com/sap-energy-utilities-espresso-sessions/en/home

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "Multi-model with SAP HANA Cloud" developer challenge
entry.content:
Totally agreed. It's getting complex in each step to find these errors.

Just came across this one. I executed - .get_table_structure(). As this was written in the comments.

entry.title: Re: Class deleted, object catalog still present?
entry.content:
Hello @jrgkraus 

See the note 1915543 - An object that has been deleted still exists in TADIR

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: Allocation with movement to layer
entry.content:
@Deb_D 

This is one limitations of Allocation in SAC where in you cannot have allocation source data, the drivers and allocation target on different intersection of a dimension. It will only work if the drivers are also on same Allocation layer as where the Allocation target will get written to.

Nikhil

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI Issue: The SAP animated focus does sometimes...
entry.content:
Hello!

Have you tested the issue in the latest SAP GUI release? 8.00?

The release you're using is very old and not supported anymore.

Also, does the issue occurs in a native Windows workstation as well? You may ask support for OS perspective in case the issue occurs only with the VDI.

Regards,

Lucas

entry.title: Re: Questions re: "Multi-model with SAP HANA Cloud" developer challenge
entry.content: Lucky you...you are able to execute the statement

entry.title: Re: Class deleted, object catalog still present?
entry.content: Did you release the transport request with the deletion?

entry.title: Group Reporting Migration Strategy
entry.content:
Hello,

I am seeking some advice on the Migration Strategy for Group Reporting in S/4HANA Cloud. Our customer will go live with S/4HANA 01/2025. 

From my understanding, we will migrate year-end balances 12/2024 into GR with the flexible upload template and do the balance carryforward in GR to period 000. After that, we can integrate the movements from ACDOCA into ACDOCU.

But what happens if our customers still has to perform year end-posting in period 13-16? Can we retrospectively post these transactions into the GR and perform the carryforward again? 

OR

Are we going live once the annual financial statements have been audited and, in the meantime, upload the monthly transactions using the flexible upload?

Thanks a lot in advance!

entry.content:
Hello,
How frequently data gets updated in the usage data management service API's?

entry.content:

entry.title: Re: Is it possible to display both English and Arabic on...
entry.content:
Hi

Please refer KBA 2908992 - How  to Adapt Form Template in Arabic or Hebrew  Language

Also,follow the steps mentioned in the Adobe’s help to maintain the RTL content in the template. The following link explains the steps in detail to maintain RTL content:

https://help.adobe.com/en_US/livecycle/11.0/DesignerHelp/WS92d06802c76abadb-39e0256b129b8b00b71-7ea7.2.html

My users are not only from one company, or entity, and they have cards with at least 5 digital signature providers. This maybe creates a bit more complicated task. Perhaps IAS or SAP IdM can support that.

Enabling the Adoption of General Display Name | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: SAP Commerce cloud 2211.24 LoginForm issue
entry.content:
My local application is up after upgrading to 2211.24 but when I try to Login as a user in the application , I see this error in console logs and a server error page

 

[Slf4jAuditableActionHandler] DB_AUDIT
WARN [hybrisHTTP119] [DefaultHandlerExceptionResolver] Resolved [org.springframework.validation.BindException: org.springframework.validation.BeanPropertyBindingResult: 3 errors<EOL>Field error in object 'loginForm' on field 'lastOtpUserName': rejected value [null]; codes [NotNull.loginForm.lastOtpUserName,NotNull.lastOtpUserName,NotNull.java.lang.String,NotNull]; arguments [org.springframework.context.support.DefaultMessageSourceResolvable: codes [loginForm.lastOtpUserName,lastOtpUserName]; arguments []; default message [lastOtpUserName]]; default message [Required]<EOL>Field error in object 'loginForm' on field 'otpPassword': rejected value [null]; codes [NotNull.loginForm.otpPassword,NotNull.otpPassword,NotNull.java.lang.String,NotNull]; arguments [org.springframework.context.support.DefaultMessageSourceResolvable: codes [loginForm.otpPassword,otpPassword]; arguments []; default message [otpPassword]]; default message [Required]<EOL>Field error in object 'loginForm' on field 'otpUserName': rejected value [null]; codes [NotNull.loginForm.otpUserName,NotNull.otpUserName,NotNull.java.lang.String,NotNull]; arguments [org.springframework.context.support.DefaultMessageSourceResolvable: codes [loginForm.otpUserName,otpUserName]; arguments []; default message [otpUserName]]; default message [Required]]

 


Apparently "LoginForm.java" has few new mandatory fields  otpUserName , otpPassword , lastOtpUserName along with pre-existing fields j_username , j_password

I have made sure the flag otp.customer.login.enabled is set to FALSE
Any pointers would be very helpful.

entry.title: web service to retrieve all detailed open customer invoices for a certain Account ID
entry.content:
Hi experts.

We are looking for SAP ByDesign web service to retrieve all open customer invoices for a certain SAP account ID (all the 'ready to be paid' invoices, which mean opened customer invoices ID, invoices date, due dates, invoice amounts).

  1. Running standard SAP WS querycustomerinvoicein and referring to SAP documentation for the SelectionByClearingStatusCode = 1 = Open.
    …. With this parameter you can search for customer invoices that have a specific clearing status.

https://help.sap.com/doc/a2b4c7ef61d64397b2b1d052082a8a08/2405/en-US/PSM_ISI_R_II_A1SCI_CI_QUERY_IB.html

 

<SelectionByClearingStatusCode>

  <InclusionExclusionCode>I</InclusionExclusionCode>

   <IntervalBoundaryTypeCode>1</IntervalBoundaryTypeCode>

<LowerBoundaryCustomerInvoiceClearingStatusCode>1</LowerBoundaryCustomerInvoiceClearingStatusCode>

              <!--ClearingCode          = 1 = Open, 2 = Cleared-->

       </SelectionByClearingStatusCode>


We can see that the field value that is recorded = 4 (= Not relevant) and therefore we cannot use this web service

2. Running standard SAP WS QueryAccountOpenAmountsIn can query only TOTAL open customer amount, but NO detailed transactions/invoices/payments.

https://help.sap.com/doc/a2b4c7ef61d64397b2b1d052082a8a08/2405/en-US/PSM_ISI_R_II_QUERY_ACCOUNT_OPEN_AMNT_IN.html

Please advise.

Thanks, Tomer

entry.title: Re: Warehouse Monitor : Searching with Purchase order num...
entry.content:
Hello @AAkash1 

Unfortunately you can't select EWM inbound deliveries by ERP PO item number. However you can select them by ERP PO number, display EWM inbound deliveries' items and use ALV filter on ERP PO item field.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: How to get the target fields has also same kind of Source field character lengths in sap PI
entry.content:
Dear Team,

we have a requirement ,  .CSV( fixed length file) file picking By SAP PI and converted xml using file adaptor FCC, 

Source field lengths : 
8,4,3,3,4,8,6,21,9,5,9,30,3,10,58,5,10,1,1,10,5,101,27,4,2,9,248,1
but target expecting JSON format file, JSON data expecting the same lengths,
Example : 
Source field length - 8 characters, here data is coming 3 characters, remaining spaces will come
Target also expecting same,
<field> PQ1----- </field>
Here " ----- " called spaces.

Input CSV file : JP1     LAB 003605025 20230127040755A9618204039          15463920 892  00000007502012023                      V11000000000000000000LU LEUCHTEINHEIT / RV LI / LED TFL FRA/G          
Output Json format : 

 "payload": [
        "JP1     LAB 003605025 20230127040755A9618204039          15463920 892  00000007502012023                      V11000000000000000000LU LEUCHTEINHEIT / RV LI / LED TFL FRA/G          


Kindly help me.

entry.title: How to remove a table from LTRC in an ODQ/ODP scenario
entry.content:
Hi SAP Team,

 

Could you please assist us in removing the tables from LTRC so we can retrigger them newly?

Steps performed to delete the table from LTRC:

  1. We tried to delete the table by using Expert Functions -> Delete Loaded Tables from the Configuration for the ODP Framework -> Enter table name = '/1LT/XXXXXX' and execute. It made no difference. The table is still running and calculating the access plan, even though we killed the related jobs from SLT and the source.
  2. We also tried to reset it using the program -> IUUC_REPL_RESET_OBJECT by selecting Delete components.

The above two steps did not help us drop the table from LTRC.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to remove a table from LTRC in an ODQ/ODP scenario
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

The requests should be stopped from ODQMON which will remove the tables from LTRC. Please see KBA https://me.sap.com/notes/3110574 for how to stop the replication for a table in an ODP/ODQ scenario.

 

Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Email configuration in S/4Hana Public Cloud for Purchase Order Quotation Email template
entry.content: Adding tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Sourcing and Procurement

entry.title: Re: [Document Information Extraction] How to Efficiently...
entry.content:
For processing PO documents, you can use our existing models for processing such documents by selecting the document type PURCHASE_ORDER and e.g. the SAP PO schema. That way, many formats might already be processed out of the box without the need to create templates (see https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/cp-aibus-dox-ui.html but use purchase order instead of invoice).

Another approach, especially in case you need to extract more information than our model supports, is to use our premium edition, this allows to extract most information without template creation (see https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/introducing-document-information-extraction-premium-edition-unleashing-the/ba-p/13574704).

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI Issue: The SAP animated focus does sometimes...
entry.content:
Hi,
yea in the meantime a managed to test it with an 800 release.
In our 800 GUI i was able to set the feature. Since we're still in 800 rollout, i was wondering if there is a solution for our current release since we haven't yet ecountered this issue when using the old virtualization product.

Since we're still missing a installation file, i'm not able to fully test this, but i'm fairly sure this would solve this issue!

Thank you very much!

Kind regards

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud_Quality Management_Incoming Inspection_Operation wise quality rejection
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We have a requirement to record quality rejection in incoming inspection for each operation in production in SAP S/4HANA Public cloud.  we have enabled Inspection type 03 and we are able to record our results for the inspection lot but could not do usage decision for this inspection lot to record the rejected quantity operation wise as per routing. 

Is there a way to record rejection in in-process inspection (triggered through operation wise routing). 

Please advise.

Thank you

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: The job failed due to an unexpected internal server error. Please contact your system admin in SAC
entry.content:
Hi SAP Members,

I have created successful connection with SAP Business ByDesign. I am getting below error in SAC   while trying to create data sets.  The job failed due to an unexpected internal server error. Please contact your system administrator...."  

The sap KBA document has no resolution points is "This issue is currently under investigation by Development." and further updates from them. 

Do anyone have idea how to solve this error? and  I have attached the error also SAP KBA screenshot 

 

Regards

Janarthanan

entry.title: How to add customer reference field in Display Line Items in General Ledger
entry.content:
It's not automatically available

entry.title: Re: How to add customer reference field in Display Line I...
entry.content: Please note this field can be added to the app via Data Source Extension. See the following documentation on how to achieve same - https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0fa84c9d9c634132b7c4abb9ffdd8f06/820a2baaa1f848a8bcc39b5a75feab58.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Re: SAC - Number Format
entry.content: thanks for the info

entry.title: SAP Enable Now – Create your training materials in the SAP Cloud, for free
entry.content:
SAP Enable Now (formerly known as SAP Workforce Performance Builder and before as Datango) - provide the knowledge your students need to succeed – exactly what, where and when it’s needed.

SAP offers content development software free of charge for SAP University Alliances Program member professors. This includes the authoring tool, “Producer and Instant Producer” which allows you to create your content and makes it easily accessible to your students.
Please note: The usage of SAP Enable Now via the University Alliances Program is only for learning purposes of the students. If a University wants to use Enable Now commercially and/or to support their productive systems they have to buy the product. More information for licensing and purchasing options for SAP Enable Now you can read here.

Your Benefits:
- Create your own training material
- Share this with your students or other universities
- Use this central platform to build training material together with partner universities
- No installation necessary, components will install automatically on-demand
- Always up to date with the newest version, no migration needed on your side
- No basic training required anymore

New Offer for SAP UA members in: SAP Enable Now in the Cloud 
All Components in one Cloud offering https://universityalliances.enable-now.cloud.sap/
C++ components as portables wrapped in JAVA as .jnlp

Interested to use this solution in your classroom?
Please contact us at sapnextgen@sap.com letting us know how do you plan to use the solution, and we will provide you information about the next steps.

Want to learn more about SAP Enable Now? Visit our Info Center to getting started

Check out this video of SAP Enable Now in 2 minutes!  

👍  Thumbs up, if you are you interested in hearing a remote session about SAP Enable Now for academic usage! And we organize the session 👍

entry.title: Re: VOFM in SD and BTE in FICO
entry.content:
2.Why do we have BTE's only for FICO ?

  1. Because BAdI were created so replacing BTE (user exit - customer exit - BTE - BAdI - Enhancements..)
  2. Also most BTE are FI/CO related but some (few) are related to PM, APO, CRM (browse with BERE and BERP)

entry.title: Re: Submissions for "SAP HANA Cloud multi-model" developer challenge: Week 4 - Geospatial
entry.content:
Thanks a lot @Vitaliy-R for this wonderful challenge. Executing geospatial queries for the first time with the rectifying the tricky errors resulted in lots of learnings(#lol) for me. This challenge repo is a must bookmark.

Goa to Vegas

entry.title: Re: Transport Management in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 3-System Landscape: From Basics to Comp
entry.content:
@ThomasSchneider Thanks for this blog, it really helped me grasp the whole concept of transport management.

I would like to do the SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition, 3-System Landscape - Transport Management Fundamentals but it doesn't show up in the results.
I am registered, it's not my first time using the Learning Hub.

Regards, Jose

entry.title: Re: Authorization in SAPUI5 apps using BOPF and CDS
entry.content:
@julio_cm This seem not possible as the Authorization check is only triggered after trying to update or manipulate data in any way. You could however imagine creating two apps, one with the button (admin mode) and one without (user mode).

Cheers, D.

entry.title: Re: Learning Journey - Consumer Products Industry
entry.content:
Hello everyone,
 
Are you eager to optimize your company’s delivery strategy and enhance performance directly at the store level? Understanding how integrated systems can streamline your distribution process is critical to achieving top-notch operational efficiency. We have a fantastic opportunity for you to explore the depths of SAP Direct Distribution and its impact on direct store delivery processes.
 
Join us on July 29, 2024, from 15:30 to 16:30 CEST (GMT+2) for an exclusive online SAP Live Session titled "Supporting the end-to-end direct store delivery business process with SAP Direct Distribution." This session is ideal for consultants, business users, and architects looking to enhance their understanding of robust distribution solutions.
 
In this one-hour session, we will explore how SAP Direct Distribution facilitates a comprehensive and agile direct store delivery business process. You will gain insights into its components and how each can significantly contribute value to businesses operating in Consumer Products and Wholesale Distribution.
 
Thanks to a live demonstration of key capabilities, you can walk away with a clearer picture, showcasing how this solution can transform your operational effectiveness and deliver better customer satisfaction.
 
Take advantage of the chance to broaden your expertise and harness the potential of SAP Direct Distribution to optimize direct store delivery operations. Sign up for the session now by following this link: https://learning.sap.com/live-sessions/supporting-the-end-to-end-direct-store-delivery-business-process-with-sap-direct-distribution.
 
I look forward to seeing you there and helping you achieve your business objectives!
 
Best regards,
Grzegorz Posyniak
 
Consumer Products Retail Wholesale Distribution

entry.title: Re: Missing permission to cancel Time Payout
entry.content: Great to hear from you marcelo28! In case the solution worked for you, then please accept the answer as solution, and give kudos! Best Regards. Thiago Eva

entry.title: SLT Rereplication of tables to HANA post QA Refresh of ECC Source systems
entry.content:
We have to rereplicate all the 2000+ tables from 5 different ECC systems.

Since we have limited setting for 

No of Data Transfer Jobs

No of Initial Load Jobs

No of Calculation jobs

The number of replications need to be confined to above setting in each MT ID right ?

How do we increase this setting so that we can improve overall replication timelines ?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SLT Rereplication of tables to HANA post QA Refresh o...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

 

The number of replications need to be confined to above setting in each MT ID right ? - That is correct, the jobs are set on a per configuration basis.

How do we increase this setting so that we can improve overall replication timelines ? - Please see KBA https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/notes/1908498

 

Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI Issue: The SAP animated focus does sometimes...
entry.content: Hi Dominik, searching by the KBAs/Notes related to "animated focus", I found almost 20 corrections, all of them are delivered in the SAP GUI patches. This is certainly a programming error that already got solved in the new SAP GUI patches (so, no workaround) :(. ->760 is not supported since 2022

entry.title: Re: reading COMP3 data through Cobol CopyBook
entry.content:
I know this is a very old post. But by chance do you remember the solution?

We are also having COMP3 fields and BODS is not able to read those fields correctly. What format did you use for your input file with COMP3 values?

entry.title: Re: Enable Lead-selection between Parent and Child entites in SAP MDG-MM
entry.content: Hello, Could you please tell me which BADI did you have to implement to solve this issue? I am facing similar issue for BP Data model.

entry.title: Adjusting dates in sales orders based on planning in TM
entry.content:
We would like to generate freight units based on customer orders, which is possible with advanced TM. As a result of subsequent transport planning, we know how long the transport takes and can determine the start date of the transport. This is the date at which the material needs to be ready.

Based on this, we would like to update the material availability date and/or the confirmed delivery date in the customer order. Is this possible? If so, how?

entry.title: Re: S4HANA Public Cloud_Order confirmation form_change ou...
entry.content: Hi Zhaoyo, Thanks for your prompt response. I have checked the above blog and compared OPD settings in my system. All the settings are enabled already. The problem here is, EDI output is triggering for the 1st time. But the business requirement is, if we do any changes to the sales order auto trigger the EDI output 2nd time with the CHANGE. ORDER_CONFIRMATION_CHANGE output which is not working at present.

entry.title: Re: In Fiori MyInbox, where can we see the 'Deadline Mess...
entry.content:
@ajaygupta ,

Thanks for the question. Did the filer Due on don't suit to your use case. because this will provide the list of Over Due items in the past, with in a week and month etc. 

It is not suggested to add the addition filter criteria to the existing SAP fiori Application. Extensibility option for the app is supported but not for this purpose of adding a filter criteria. 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/a630d57fc5004c6383e7a81efee7a8bb/b563175740945b38e10000000a44147b.html 

Hope this helps, otherwise please let us know. Thanks. 

Best Regards,

Sri

entry.title: Re: Assignment of „SAP Learning reporting user“ and/or „S...
entry.content:
Hi Florian,

you are correct. it's handled via support requests.

Customers with less than 100 licenses can simply raise a new support ticket. 

Customers with more than 100 licenses can nominate additional analytics users via their standard user upload file processes and flag additional users as reporting users.

Please note that the number of analytics/admin users is limited to max. 15% of your license quantity (documented in the LH product documentation).

I hope this helps,

Ingo

entry.title: Re: HTML tags in story reports
entry.content: Can I get an update please?

entry.title: Re: How to Remove Cards from Fiori Apps
entry.content: But how do we remove a card in design time, ie. in Visual Editor. There are no options to remove cards, you can block them or add controller extensions but can't remove a card. Is there a remove button I'm not seeing?

entry.title: Re: NF-e Nota Técnica 2023.004 v1.10: novos campos adicionados à nota fiscal
entry.content:
Bom dia!

Na aplicação da nota SAP do GRC 3426933 - NF-e NT2019.001 & NT2023.004, as estruturas SPRX não estão sendo ativadas, ficando com o seguinte erro:  

Na SE80 - objetos inativos é possivel ver esses objetos, mas não deixa ativar, conforme mensagem abaixo:

Alguem já passou por este erro?  Alguem teve algum problema na aplicação desta nota do GRC? 

SAP Team, conseguem me orientar na resolução deste erro?

Obrigado.

entry.title: WXT Temu Coupon $100 Off{acu715892} For July Month Customers
entry.content:
Don't miss the chance to save significantly in July with a $100 off Temu coupon. Use code {acu715892} for a substantial discount on electronics, fashion, home goods, and more.

SAP, originally an abbreviation for Systemanalyse Programmentwicklung (German for System Analysis Program Development), has become synonymous with enterprise software solutions. Founded in 1972 by five former IBM employees in Germany, SAP has grown into a multinational giant, shaping how businesses manage their operations worldwide.

At its core, SAP offers a suite of software applications designed to integrate various business functions. Imagine a company with separate departments for finance, human resources, inventory, sales, and customer service. Traditionally, each department might use its own software, creating data silos and inefficiencies. SAP software bridges this gap by providing a unified platform where all departments can access and share critical information.

The cornerstone of SAP's success is its Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) software. ERP acts as the central nervous system of a business, streamlining core processes like:

Financial Management: Track income, expenses, and budgets, automate financial tasks, and gain real-time financial insights.
Supply Chain Management: Manage inventory levels, optimize purchasing, and ensure on-time delivery of goods.
Human Capital Management: Recruit and onboard employees, manage payroll and benefits, and track employee performance.
Customer Relationship Management (CRM): Track customer interactions, manage sales pipelines, and provide exceptional customer service.
The benefits of implementing SAP are numerous. Here's a glimpse of what SAP can bring to the table:

Enhanced Efficiency: Streamlined workflows and centralized data lead to faster processes, reduced errors, and improved productivity.
Improved Visibility: Real-time data access across departments allows for better decision-making based on accurate information.
Increased Collaboration: Departments can collaborate more effectively with a shared view of customer data, inventory levels, and financial performance.
Reduced Costs: Streamlined processes minimize operational expenses, and improved inventory management reduces waste.
Scalability: SAP solutions can grow with your business, accommodating future expansion.
However, SAP isn't a one-size-fits-all solution. The company offers a range of products catering to different business needs. Here's a breakdown of some key offerings:

SAP S/4HANA: The latest ERP suite built on an in-memory database for faster processing and real-time analytics.
SAP Business One: A simplified ERP solution designed for small and medium-sized businesses.
SAP Cloud Solutions: Cloud-based versions of SAP software offering greater flexibility and scalability.
Industry-Specific Solutions: Tailored solutions for specific industries like healthcare, manufacturing, and retail.
Implementing SAP can be a complex process, requiring significant investment in software, training, and ongoing maintenance. However, for businesses seeking to gain a competitive edge through improved efficiency, data-driven decision-making, and better collaboration, SAP remains a powerful tool.

As the business landscape continues to evolve, SAP is constantly innovating. The company is embracing cloud technologies, artificial intelligence, and machine learning, ensuring its solutions remain relevant in the digital age. Whether you're a small startup or a global enterprise, SAP offers a potential path to optimizing your operations and achieving sustainable growth.

entry.title: Unwrapping the Latest Innovations: Support Package 14 for Focused Build
entry.content:
We are excited to announce the release of Support Package 14 (SP14) for Focused Build in SAP Solution Manager. This update brings a host of new functionalities designed to enhance user experience and streamline implementation projects. Here are three key features of SP14:

1. Custom Fields in Solution Readiness Dashboard

With SP14, custom fields can now be added to the Solution Readiness Dashboard. This enhancement allows project managers to tailor the dashboard to their specific needs, providing a more personalized and comprehensive view of project status and metrics. Custom fields enable users to track additional data points and KPIs that are critical to their project’s success, ensuring more informed decision-making and better project outcomes.

2. Check In and Check Out Functionality for Documents

Managing project documentation just got easier with the new check in and check out functionality directly available from within the Work Package or Work Item. This feature allows users to lock documents while they are being edited, preventing simultaneous modifications and ensuring version control. Once edits are complete, the document can be checked back in, making it available for further updates or reviews. This functionality enhances collaboration and reduces the risk of conflicting changes, maintaining the integrity of project documents.

check in / check out of documents

 3. Enhanced Document Reporting Dashboard

The document reporting dashboard has been extended to include new personalization options and the display of custom KPIs. Users can now tailor the dashboard to show only the most relevant information, making it easier to monitor document status and performance metrics. The ability to display custom KPIs means that project teams can focus on the most critical indicators of success, improving transparency and accountability.

Documentation Reporting Dashboard

Support Package 14 for Focused Build in SAP Solution Manager is designed to provide greater flexibility, improved collaboration, and enhanced reporting capabilities. Besides the mentioned new capabilities we also improved in other areas, for example Test Management or Requirements Management. We also strongly focus on stability and reliability to improve the overall experience with Focused Build for our more than 2200 productive customers (by the way, an all time high).

entry.title: The value of the 'Tax' output parameter of the formula is missing
entry.content:
Hi, 

I created a new formula for Tax (Brazil TAX), IPI with ICMS calculation base, but it has an error due to the lack of tax output parameters.

How do I identify where to fix this error?

entry.title: Not getting complete data from SAP T-code \n\pbs\fagll03
entry.content:
Dear Friends,

User is facing this problem.

Usually when we run the T-code \n\pbs\fagll03 in SAP for any account, It gives use all the transactions posted for the particular account. However, from last couple of months we have seen it is not generating complete report and generates only limited transactions. We are in ECC 6.0

Please suggest.

Regards
Sridhar

entry.title: TXR $100 Off Temu Coupon CODE({acu715892}) For First Order
entry.content:
Yes, Temu offers $100 off coupon code {acu715892} for first time users. You can get a $100 bonus plus 30% off any purchase at Temu with the $100 Coupon Bundle at Temu if you sign up with the referral code [acu715892] and make a first purchase of $100 or More.

SAP, originally an abbreviation for Systemanalyse Programmentwicklung (German for System Analysis Program Development), has become synonymous with enterprise software solutions. Founded in 1972 by five former IBM employees in Germany, SAP has grown into a multinational giant, shaping how businesses manage their operations worldwide.

At its core, SAP offers a suite of software applications designed to integrate various business functions. Imagine a company with separate departments for finance, human resources, inventory, sales, and customer service. Traditionally, each department might use its own software, creating data silos and inefficiencies. SAP software bridges this gap by providing a unified platform where all departments can access and share critical information.

The cornerstone of SAP's success is its Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) software. ERP acts as the central nervous system of a business, streamlining core processes like:

Financial Management: Track income, expenses, and budgets, automate financial tasks, and gain real-time financial insights.
Supply Chain Management: Manage inventory levels, optimize purchasing, and ensure on-time delivery of goods.
Human Capital Management: Recruit and onboard employees, manage payroll and benefits, and track employee performance.
Customer Relationship Management (CRM): Track customer interactions, manage sales pipelines, and provide exceptional customer service.
The benefits of implementing SAP are numerous. Here's a glimpse of what SAP can bring to the table:

Enhanced Efficiency: Streamlined workflows and centralized data lead to faster processes, reduced errors, and improved productivity.
Improved Visibility: Real-time data access across departments allows for better decision-making based on accurate information.
Increased Collaboration: Departments can collaborate more effectively with a shared view of customer data, inventory levels, and financial performance.
Reduced Costs: Streamlined processes minimize operational expenses, and improved inventory management reduces waste.
Scalability: SAP solutions can grow with your business, accommodating future expansion.
However, SAP isn't a one-size-fits-all solution. The company offers a range of products catering to different business needs. Here's a breakdown of some key offerings:

SAP S/4HANA: The latest ERP suite built on an in-memory database for faster processing and real-time analytics.
SAP Business One: A simplified ERP solution designed for small and medium-sized businesses.
SAP Cloud Solutions: Cloud-based versions of SAP software offering greater flexibility and scalability.
Industry-Specific Solutions: Tailored solutions for specific industries like healthcare, manufacturing, and retail.
Implementing SAP can be a complex process, requiring significant investment in software, training, and ongoing maintenance. However, for businesses seeking to gain a competitive edge through improved efficiency, data-driven decision-making, and better collaboration, SAP remains a powerful tool.

As the business landscape continues to evolve, SAP is constantly innovating. The company is embracing cloud technologies, artificial intelligence, and machine learning, ensuring its solutions remain relevant in the digital age. Whether you're a small startup or a global enterprise, SAP offers a potential path to optimizing your operations and achieving sustainable growth.

entry.title: Re: S/4 Hana Cloud Public - Configuring "Value Date Rules for Bank Transactions"
entry.content: Adding tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Finance

entry.title: Re: CRM Courses
entry.content: As an MBA graduate, you've got some great options ahead! SAP courses like CRM, FICO, and S4/HANA each offer unique advantages. I've found that understanding your career goals and industry focus can really guide your choice.

entry.title: Story reports not loading
entry.content:
Hi there, 

Story reports have stopped loading again today, it's been 3 hours now with no solution yet. This happened last week too. This is effecting all users with access to reports. 

Please can Story Report improvements be made a priority? In line with the SAP updates we have migrated 90% of existing canvas reports to story reports. It is disappointing to have moved to a model which is not yet ready.

The error message today reads as if there is an active session open in another tab and therefore the Story Report can't load. This is not the case and I have cleared all cache, cookies and history. 

It would be good to get an update from SAP as to how they plan to manage these necessary improvements. 

Thanks 
Ais

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano, I came across this Digital Skills opportunity and I'm interested at this. Recently I am working at one of our HR teams at SAP and would like to learn any new skills, which might help me to change my job and field.    

I've never studied IT official way such as an university but undergone an interesting week of Java for high school graduates at one IT company some years ago. Right now in my free time I am self studying the GitHub and later on Git, Python, SQL.   

I'm not sure if I qualify for this program but I appreciate what opportunity you offer to all of us. 😃

Regards,

snowsmoonjupiter

entry.title: Re: Automatic serial number determination during confirmation of production order in S/4HC ?
entry.content: adding tag SAP S/4HANA Cloud for Manufacturing
